summary: P1/P2 Features Testing Complete - Trailing Stops, Bot Brain, Proactive Intelligence all working. 16/17 backend tests passed. All key frontend features verified: Bot Performance Chart (custom SVG), Order Pipeline, BOT'S BRAIN with thoughts, PROACTIVE INTELLIGENCE alerts, IN-TRADE GUIDANCE alerts, Charts tab with live data.
